scripts.deploy:test: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env test
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:dry-run:test: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env test --dry-run
scripts.deploy:dry-run:staging: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env staging --dry-run
scripts.deploy:dry-run:production: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env production --dry-run
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm test && pnpm run build && pnpm run infra:fmt
scripts.verify:full:test: pnpm run verify && pnpm run infra:validate && pnpm run deploy:dry-run:test
scripts.verify:full:staging: pnpm run verify && pnpm run infra:validate && pnpm run deploy:dry-run:staging
scripts.verify:full:production: pnpm run verify && pnpm run infra:validate && pnpm run deploy:dry-run:production
scripts.release:check:test: pnpm run env:check && pnpm run db:migrate:plan && pnpm run verify:full:test
scripts.release:check:staging: pnpm run env:check && pnpm run db:migrate:plan && pnpm run verify:full:staging
scripts.release:check:production: pnpm run env:check && pnpm run db:migrate:plan && pnpm run verify:full:production
